notes: Feature #2 — Age-based child cost scenario. The 'Have a child' scenario now models monthly costs that change as the child grows, instead of a single flat figure. Five editable age bands seeded with India urban middle/upper-middle-class estimates (researched): 0-3 ₹18,000/mo, 3-6 ₹22,000/mo, 6-15 ₹28,000/mo, 15-18 ₹35,000/mo, 18-22 ₹45,000/mo. Each band's amount and cutoff age are editable. Costs apply by the child's age (computed from the arrival month), grow yearly at the user's expense rate, and stop after the last band. A live preview shows the estimated nominal lifetime total to the final age. Optional one-time (delivery/setup) cost still supported and auto-commits. Legacy flat-monthlyCost kid scenarios still work (fallback). Note: figures are ballparks (private schooling, urban) and vary hugely by city/school choice — fully editable. Flows into both Projection and Net Worth pages like any scenario.
